posts.author: dpk1994
posts.community: Ola Electric - Full Stack EV play?
posts.text: After selling my entire holding in November 2025 at around ₹41, at a small loss, I slowly started accumulating again from the ₹23-24 range in March 2026. Since the lows of March 2026, I can actually see a decent turnaround - maybe not a spectacular one yet, but certainly a meaningful improvement. Sales are currently trailing around 15,000 units per month. Looking at the momentum, crossing 17,000-18,000 units per month does not look unrealistic with some more effort. If Ola can sustain volumes above 15,000 units, the automotive segment should ideally start generating some cash. However, I perso…

posts.author: suryawomshi
posts.community: Ola Electric - Full Stack EV play?
posts.text: I am using S1 Pro Gen 2 and used it for 40k kms what my observations most of the issues are related to software, poor quality parts, Mostly Throttle, Suspension, Fork parts, Belt and Brake pads. I wanted to buy 2 more scooters kept it on hold as service not improved, getting appointment is very very difficult and all service centres are now 20-30 kms away from my location, I call it digital lock out, I wanted to write a Detailed Mail/Post to Board of Directors, Investor relations, Local RTO and Concerned ministry on the company opening showrooms and selling vehicles without proper service netw…

Ola bought the scooter company and then made patch upgrades on top of that platform, but they have always been saying product quality is top notch, and product price/value prop is also top - its only the service backlog. posts.author: keshugarg
posts.community: Ola Electric - Full Stack EV play?
posts.text: Google parivahan dashboard. On the website select tabular view on top right corner. On Y axis select maker and on X axis select fuel. Click on refresh. After that select two wheeler below the drop-down placed below refresh button. Select period for which you want to check data. It’s yearly or monthly basis. On left side there will be red arrow. Click the button. It is filter. Select TWO WHEELER in VEHICLE CATEGORY and PURE EV in FUEL. Click on refresh. You will get list of total registrations done by all the two wheeler ev companies for that period.
